title: specularia speculum-veneris subsp. castellana
intro: Specularia speculum-veneris subsp. castellana, also known as Castellana's speculum-veneris, is a plant species in the family Plantaginaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its potential antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Specularia speculum-veneris subsp. castellana include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is typically harvested in the summer months when its leaves are at their peak potency.
